name: MIYEON
title: Endless Dream

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Echo Strike
basic.description: MIYEON teleports to the enemy to land consecutive strikes. Deals Light elemental damage.

core.name: Midtone Slash
core.description: MIYEON moves forward and delivers a powerful upward strike. Deals Light elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect.

skill.name: Descending Glissando
skill.description: MIYEON leaps forward to perform two counterclockwise spins while slashing, then delivers a powerful downward strike. Deals Light elemental damage. When the final hit lands it [Knocks Down] the target. Places [Green Mana Power Crystals] on the ground (damage: 250% of Descending Glissando's damage).

skill.name: Doubletime Lunge
skill.description: MIYEON channels her mana power to launch the enemy into the air, focuses energy into her sword to deliver a powerful slash, and then detonates mana power crystals. Deals Light elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Places [Yellow Mana Power Crystals] on the ground (damage: 250% of Doubletime Lunge's damage). Activates Critical Slash for 10s. Critical Slash: same damage as Doubletime Lunge; activates [Breath] (Power Gauge +10%, Shield 5% Max HP, 5s), [Vocalization] (Ultimate Skill damage +10%, Shield 5% Max HP, 5s), [Reverberation] (Core Attack damage +10%, Shield 5% Max HP, 5s) while held.

support.name: Reverberating Strike
support.description: MIYEON leaps forward to perform two counterclockwise spins while slashing, then delivers a powerful downward strike. Deals Light elemental damage. When the final hit lands it [Knocks Down] the target.

qte.name: Dual Aria
qte.description: MIYEON lands from the air with a downward strike. Deals Light elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, skills that inflict the [Stun] or [Blind] effects, or a Shadow Skill.

ultimate.name: Headliner
ultimate.description: After enveloping her weapon with power, MIYEON delivers a powerful slash to finish her attack. Deals Light elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Disables currently active Critical Slash. Resets the cooldown of Descending Glissando and Doubletime Lunge.

passive.name: Highlight / Mana Power Crystals
passive.description: The entire team gains [FOREVER] (+5% damage dealt, stacks up to 3 times, Infinite) when entering the Encore Mission and Instance Dungeon. Using Headliner activates [Highlight]: Using Core Attack causes the user to place a [Black Mana Power Crystal] (damage: 250% of Core Attack damage); Light damage +15%; Shield equal to 5% of MIYEON's Max HP; Defense +30%; Duration: 15s.

advancements: When the user enters the stage it charges their Power Gauge by 50%. Using Headliner activates their Core Attack and restores 600 MP.

Using Descending Glissando, Doubletime Lunge, or Critical Slash grants the user a Shield equal to 5% of MIYEON's Max HP for 15s (stacks up to 10 times). When the Shield effect is activated the user's Defense increases by 6% for 30s (stacks up to 10 times).
For every Light ally, the Defense of Light team members increases by 3%.

Using Headliner: Critical Hit Rate +10%, Critical Hit damage +20% for 15s. When the user uses Descending Glissando, Doubletime Lunge, or Critical Slash it charges MIYEON's Power Gauge by 3% and reduces the cooldown of Headliner by 4.5s.
